# China Compliance Tools

> AI agent providing Chinese advertising law compliance, AI search visibility auditing, and cross-border data compliance assessment.

## What is this?

China Compliance Tools is a set of APIs that help AI agents and developers ensure their content and applications comply with Chinese regulations. It covers three critical areas where most international tools fall short:

### 1. Advertising Law Compliance (`/api/check`)
- **200+ banned words** across 5 Chinese platforms (Baidu, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, Taobao, WeChat)
- Risk-level classification: 🔴 High (封号/罚款), 🟡 Medium (限流/降权), 🟢 Low (建议修改)
- Safe replacement suggestions for every violation
- Chinese advertising law (广告法) violations can result in fines up to ¥200,000

### 2. AI Search Visibility / GEO (`/api/geo/audit`)
- Audit brand visibility in **5 Chinese AI search engines**: DeepSeek, Kimi, 豆包, 通义千问, 文心一言
- 5-dimension scoring: compliance risk, engagement potential, brand safety, SEO visibility, AI citation probability
- Competitor analysis: see which competitors AI engines recommend instead of you
- 32% of brands are invisible in DeepSeek; 41% have AI recommending competitors

### 3. Cross-Border Data Compliance (`/api/data-export/assess`)
- Assess compliance with **PIPL** (China), **GDPR** (EU), **CCPA** (US/California)
- Risk assessment with required actions before launch
- Apps with >1M users must submit cross-border data transfer assessments
- GDPR fines can reach €20M or 4% of global revenue

## Quick Start

### REST API (No auth required for free tier)

```bash
# Check advertising law compliance
curl -X POST https://1341839497-2yuxt6z58d.ap-guangzhou.tencentscf.com/api/check \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"text": "我们的产品是全国最好的，效果第一", "platform": "douyin"}'

# Audit brand AI search visibility
curl -X POST https://1341839497-2yuxt6z58d.ap-guangzhou.tencentscf.com/api/geo/audit \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"brand": "华为", "keywords": ["手机", "5G"]}'

# Assess data export compliance
curl -X POST https://1341839497-2yuxt6z58d.ap-guangzhou.tencentscf.com/api/data-export/assess \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"description": "电商应用，收集用户姓名地址支付信息，数据存储在AWS新加坡"}'
```

### MCP (Model Context Protocol)

Connect via SSE:
```
http://150.158.119.19/mcp/china-compliance/sse
```

Available tools:
- `check_compliance` — Check text for Chinese advertising law violations
- `audit_geo_visibility` — Audit brand visibility in Chinese AI search engines
- `assess_data_export` — Assess cross-border data transfer compliance

### Spec Kit Extension

```bash
specify extension add china-compliance --from https://github.com/lm203688/spec-kit-china-compliance/archive/refs/tags/v1.0.0.zip
```

## Agent Discovery

This service supports multiple agent discovery protocols:

| Protocol | URL |
|----------|-----|
| agent.json | `https://1341839497-2yuxt6z58d.ap-guangzhou.tencentscf.com/agent.json` |
| OpenAPI 3.1 | `https://1341839497-2yuxt6z58d.ap-guangzhou.tencentscf.com/.well-known/openapi.json` |
| AI Plugin | `https://1341839497-2yuxt6z58d.ap-guangzhou.tencentscf.com/.well-known/ai-plugin.json` |
| MCP SSE | `http://150.158.119.19/mcp/china-compliance/sse` |
| llms.txt | `https://1341839497-2yuxt6z58d.ap-guangzhou.tencentscf.com/llms.txt` |
| JSON-LD | Embedded in HTML pages via `<script type="application/ld+json">` |

## Pricing

| Tool | Free Tier | Pro |
|------|-----------|-----|
| Compliance Check | 5 checks/month | ¥49/month |
| GEO Audit | 3 audits/month | ¥149/month |
| Data Export Assessment | 2 assessments/month | ¥199/month |

## Web Apps

- [合规通](https://1341839497-jv04655vcs.ap-shanghai.tencentscf.com/) — Advertising law compliance checker
- [AI搜索可见度](https://1341839497-1w5tkesfb0.ap-shanghai.tencentscf.com/) — Brand AI visibility auditor
- [AIGC检测](https://1341839497-gi14eledh6.ap-shanghai.tencentscf.com/) — AI-generated content detector
- [数据出境自评](https://1341839497-72h2iknf4m.ap-shanghai.tencentscf.com/) — Cross-border data compliance
